name: SOC Framework PoV Test
description: PoV scenario replay pack for SOC Framework demonstrations. Provides the SOCFWPoVSender integration for sending attack scenario event data to XSIAM via HTTP Collector, pre-built scenario data lists for the Turla Carbon attack chain (CrowdStrike + Proofpoint TAP), and a teardown reminder JOB. Install on PoV and dev tenants only. Uninstall before PS handoff.
author: Palo Alto Networks
